# Tiresias - AI Agent Security Platform

> Zero-knowledge agent security for the enterprise. Identity, authorization, and runtime protection — without ever accessing your data.

Tiresias is a runtime security platform purpose-built for AI agents. It provides cryptographic agent identity (SoulAuth), zero-trust policy enforcement, behavioral anomaly detection, and automated quarantine — all operating on metadata only, never touching agent payloads.

## Core Products

- [SoulAuth](https://tiresias.network/platform): Cryptographic agent identity and just-in-time authorization. Hardware-bound soulkey identity, policy-as-code (YAML, git-versioned), zero standing permissions.
- [SoulWatch](https://tiresias.network/platform): Real-time behavioral analytics with Sigma-compatible detection rules. 18 anomaly types with per-agent baselines, 60 threat patterns scored in 0.39ms.
- [SoulGate](https://tiresias.network/platform): API security gateway with rate limiting, schema validation, and threat detection at the API layer.

## Key Capabilities

- 18 behavioral anomaly types with per-agent baselines
- 60 threat patterns scored in 0.39ms average latency
- Sigma-compatible detection rules for SOC integration
- Native SIEM output (Splunk, Elastic, Microsoft Sentinel)
- Prompt injection detection
- Context window exfiltration detection
- Privilege escalation via tool call detection
- Seven graduated automated response actions (alert to full isolation)
- Multi-tenancy with row-level security
- Policy-as-code with git-versioned YAML declarations
- GDPR Article 25 compliance by design

## Architecture

Tiresias uses a zero-knowledge architecture. Agent payloads never leave customer infrastructure. Policy evaluation uses metadata only. Cryptographic proofs replace data inspection. Privacy is architectural, not policy-based.

## Use Cases

- Enterprise AI agent fleet security
- Agentic AI runtime monitoring
- Agent-to-agent traffic visibility
- Compliance and audit trail for AI agents
- MSSP multi-tenant agent security

## Pricing

- Free tier: 1,000 agent authentications/month
- Enterprise plans available
- Contact: https://tiresias.network/company#contact
